2603.23971.title: The Price Reversal Phenomenon: When Cheaper Reasoning Models End Up Costing More
2603.23971.paper_summary: Developers and consumers increasingly choose reasoning language models (RLMs) based on their listed API prices. However, how accurately do these prices reflect actual inference costs? We conduct the first systematic study of this question, evaluating 8 frontier RLMs across 9 diverse tasks covering competition math, science QA, code generation, and multi-domain reasoning. We uncover the pricing reversal phenomenon: in 21.8% of model-pair comparisons, the model with a lower listed price actually incurs a higher total cost, with reversal magnitude reaching up to 28x. For example, Gemini 3 Flash's listed price is 78% cheaper than GPT-5.2's, yet its actual cost across all tasks is 22% higher. We trace the root cause to vast heterogeneity in thinking token consumption: on the same query, one model may use 900% more thinking tokens than another. In fact, removing thinking token costs reduces ranking reversals by 70% and raises the rank correlation (Kendall's $τ$ ) between price and cost rankings from 0.563 to 0.873. We further show that per-query cost prediction is fundamentally difficult: repeated runs of the same query yield thinking token variation up to 9.7x, establishing an irreducible noise floor for any predictor. Our findings demonstrate that listed API pricing is an unreliable proxy for actual cost, calling for cost-aware model selection and transparent per-request cost monitoring.
2603.23971.paper_summary_zh: 開發者和消費者越來越多地根據其列出的 API 價格選擇推理語言模型 (RLMs)。然而，這些價格在多大程度上準確反映了實際的推理成本？我們對這個問題進行了首次系統性研究，評估了 8 個前沿 RLM 在 9 個不同任務上的表現，涵蓋競爭數學、科學問答、代碼生成和多領域推理。我們發現了價格反轉現象：在 21.8% 的模型對比中，列出價格較低的模型實際上產生了更高的總成本，反轉幅度達到 28 倍。例如，Gemini 3 Flash 的列出價格比 GPT-5.2 便宜 78%，但其在所有任務上的實際成本卻高出 22%。我們追溯根本原因在於思考令牌消耗的巨大異質性：在相同查詢下，一個模型的思考令牌使用量可能比另一個多出 900%。事實上，去除思考令牌成本後，排名反轉減少了 70%，並將價格與成本排名之間的排名相關性 (Kendall's $τ$) 從 0.563 提高到 0.873。我們進一步表明，每次查詢的成本預測在根本上是困難的：對相同查詢的重複運行會導致思考令牌變化高達 9.7 倍，為任何預測器建立了一個不可減少的噪音底線。我們的研究結果表明，列出的 API 價格並不是實際成本的可靠代理，呼籲進行成本意識的模型選擇和透明的每次請求成本監控。
2603.23971.author: Lingjiao Chen et.al.
2603.23971.authors: Lingjiao Chen, Chi Zhang, Yeye He, Ion Stoica, Matei Zaharia, James Zou
